rows.label: qev055804_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ahahaha! Chikochiko's Nopon jokes
are really sharp today, aren't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055804_MSG0002
rows.name:
Money exists to be spent, you know!
So of course I wouldn't have any left on me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055804_MSG0003
rows.name:
Besides, I already ate 25 pizzas,
so I don't have anything to give back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055804_MSG0006
rows.name:
Haha! I thought the Orpheans were more villainous folks,
but they seem super friendly, don't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055804_MSG0007
rows.name:
I definitely want Min'boiton-chan to join our
little gossip circle too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055804_MSG0008
rows.name:
The Amidresia Tomato that Min'boiton-chan wants
is supposed to be at Sayram Lake, I think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055804_MSG0009
rows.name:
I don't know the details, but it would be great
if he manages to use Shirya-chan's techniques![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055804_MSG0010
rows.name:
Min'boiton-chan is really smart, isn't he!
He memorized every single word Shirya-chan said
without missing a beat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055804_MSG0011
rows.name:
He's completely different from us forgetful ones!
It's totally great![ST:wait ]
